title: FabricationNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-fabrication-server-rs for fabrication planning, instruction validation, and learning result fan-out.

$dd:nats.summary: Fabrication planning and validation request/result subjects.

subjects.name: FabricationRequests
subjects.description: Fabrication planning requests. Default for FABRICATION_REQUEST_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.requests

subjects.name: FabricationResults
subjects.description: Fabrication planning and validation results. Default for FABRICATION_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.results

subjects.name: FabricationMachineProfileRequests
subjects.description: Machine capability, calibration, fixture, tool, material, and maintenance profile requests for printers, mills, lathes, routers, sheet cutters, postprocess stations, and inspection equipment.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.machine.profiles.requests

subjects.name: FabricationMachineProfileResults
subjects.description: Machine profile results carrying capability snapshots, calibration state, tool and fixture readiness, material/process state, maintenance blockers, and release evidence.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.machine.profiles.results

subjects.name: FabricationDesignSynthesisRequests
subjects.description: Design synthesis requests for workers that turn fabrication intent, constraints, parametric templates, learning hints, and CAD references into generated design candidates.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.design.synthesis.requests

subjects.name: FabricationDesignSynthesisResults
subjects.description: Design synthesis results carrying generated design candidates, parametric source artifacts, manufacturability evidence, blockers, and review metadata.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.design.synthesis.results

subjects.name: FabricationDesignConversionRequests
subjects.description: Design input conversion requests for CAD, mesh, slicer, CAM setup, and neutral export workers.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.design.conversion.requests

subjects.name: FabricationDesignConversionResults
subjects.description: Design input conversion results carrying neutral exports, translator evidence, blockers, and review metadata.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.design.conversion.results

subjects.name: FabricationInstructionGenerationRequests
subjects.description: Instruction generation requests for slicer, CAM, postprocess, setup-sheet, and machine-code workers.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.generation.requests

subjects.name: FabricationInstructionGenerationResults
subjects.description: Instruction generation results carrying machine code, setup sheets, simulation evidence, blockers, and release metadata.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.generation.results

subjects.name: FabricationInstructionSimulationRequests
subjects.description: Instruction simulation and verification requests for generated or imported printer jobs, G-code, NC programs, lathe cycles, sheet-cutting files, and setup evidence.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.simulation.requests

subjects.name: FabricationInstructionSimulationResults
subjects.description: Instruction simulation and verification results carrying machine-envelope checks, toolpath/process findings, failure boundaries, and release blockers.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.simulation.results

subjects.name: FabricationInstructionReviewRequests
subjects.description: Imported fabrication instruction review requests for existing G-code, NC programs, slicer files, setup sheets, sheet-cutting jobs, and operator instructions.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.review.requests

subjects.name: FabricationInstructionReviewResults
subjects.description: Imported fabrication instruction review results carrying validation findings, improvement drafts, machine-failure boundaries, and release blockers.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.review.results

subjects.name: FabricationAssemblyPlanningRequests
subjects.description: Hybrid assembly and process-decomposition requests for workers that split, combine, join, and sequence printed, milled, turned, sheet-cut, and postprocessed parts.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.assembly.planning.requests

subjects.name: FabricationAssemblyPlanningResults
subjects.description: Hybrid assembly and process-decomposition results carrying part splits, joins, process sequences, learning state, blockers, and release metadata.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.assembly.planning.results

subjects.name: FabricationLearningOutcomeRequests
subjects.description: Fabrication outcome learning requests for MDP, POMDP, neural-policy, reward, replay, and failure-boundary updaters.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.learning.outcomes.requests

subjects.name: FabricationLearningOutcomeResults
subjects.description: Fabrication outcome learning results carrying accepted model updates, replay labels, reward summaries, and retained failure boundaries.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.learning.outcomes.results

subjects.name: FabricationReleaseReadinessRequests
subjects.description: Final fabrication release readiness requests that aggregate design, assembly, instruction, review, learning, machine, operator, and evidence state before machine-ready release.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.release.readiness.requests

subjects.name: FabricationReleaseReadinessResults
subjects.description: Final fabrication release readiness results carrying release decisions, required human interventions, retained blockers, and machine-ready manifests.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.fabrication.release.readiness.results
